title: Subitems linked to Task Timeline
excerpt: I use the subitems as granular tasks that role into the larger task (or pulse). So, if one of my subitem timeline shifts, it impacts the end date of the pulse timeline. Is there a way to link the subitems timeline to the…

posts.author: shethster (Amy)
posts.cookedHtml: I use the subitems as granular tasks that role into the larger task (or pulse). So, if one of my subitem timeline shifts, it impacts the end date of the pulse timeline. Is there a way to link the subitems timeline to the pulse timeline, such that if one of the subtasks timelines get delayed, it also updates the pulse timeline? Manually updating the pulse is unideal as I may forget to back and do so.

posts.author: AronK (Aron-monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @shethster!

Did you end up finding a solution for this? I created a quick video here and curious if this would help with your use case. Can you take a look and let me know?

-Aron

posts.author: cberman (Corey)
posts.cookedHtml: This feature is awesome! The Mirror field works great in the parent task to create a timeline based on the subitems Date. Fyi it also works now on subitems Timeline field.
